steps.title: Throne controls
steps.body: Advance day, week, or year from the bar at the top. Calamities, weekly briefings, aide proposals, and year-end reviews pause the clock until you respond.

steps.title: Country map
steps.body: The map is your home base. Pulsing red regions signal active calamities — click a tile, then jump to its population.

steps.title: Weekly reports
steps.body: Every seven days you get a cabinet briefing on the worst-performing regions. Choose relief, reform, or endurance for the primary province.

steps.title: Inner circle
steps.body: Twice each 28-day month an aide proposes an executive order. Approve, compromise, or reject — effects are local and time-boxed.

steps.title: Dispatch log
steps.body: Recent dispatches under the throne bar and on Records summarize calamities, edicts, mandates, and year-end milestones.

steps.title: Sector levers
steps.body: During play, open the Sector Atlas, pick a sub-sector, and issue a labor edict or reform roles to rebalance workers mid-run.

steps.title: Citizen dossier
steps.body: On the Population page, click a citizen card to open their dossier and see what is driving their quality of life.

steps.title: Calamity responses
steps.body: When disaster strikes, choose Relief or Rebuild to spend national stockpile and blunt the crisis, or Endure at full severity. Expect at least one calamity per month.

steps.title: Stockpiles & flows
steps.body: Surplus extraction fills a national stockpile; industry draws it down before shortfalls bite. Domestic flows move goods between provinces — logistics labor reduces friction.

steps.title: Royal mandates
steps.body: Each year brings a mandate in the throne bar. Fulfill it before year-end for bonus score and the Royal Mandate badge.

steps.title: Year in review
steps.body: After each annual cycle, a cabinet briefing summarizes population change, score, calamities, and your mandate result.
